modules.discoverSubtitle: Turn your offering into ranked French opportunities

modules.eventsSubtitle: Trade shows and conferences worth attending
modules.newsSubtitle: Business news turned into actionable signals
modules.brandsSubtitle: Trademark search and conflict analysis (INPI / EUIPO / WIPO)
modules.creditMethodTitle: What the scores mean & how they are built
modules.creditMethodIntro: The Trust Score is the average of the 5 dimensions below. Every score runs 0–100 — higher is better (for risk dimensions, higher means lower risk).
modules.creditDisclaimer: Scores are algorithmic estimates from public data, for initial guidance only. They are not a credit report, a credit rating, or investment/transaction advice.
modules.dimFinancialHealth: Financial Health — profitability and scale, driven by the company's real revenue and net margin (data.gouv.fr).
modules.dimPaymentRisk: Payment Risk — likelihood of paying on time (payment incidents, average days-to-pay / DSO). A higher score means lower default risk.
modules.dimSupplierReliability: Supplier Reliability — delivery consistency and contract continuity as a supplier.
modules.dimLegalRisk: Legal Risk — driven by real BODACC notices (insolvency / recovery procedures, etc.). A higher score means lower legal risk.
modules.dimGrowth: Growth — momentum in revenue, headcount and market share.

services.ctaPartner: Get help from a certified partner
services.partnerNote: We connect you with vetted local partners (lawyers, accountants, IP agents) to handle the whole process for you.
services.disclaimer: General guidance only — not legal advice.
services.companyTitle: Set up a company in France
services.companyIntro: A practical overview of registering a French company (SAS / SARL …).
companySteps: Choose a legal form (SAS/SASU, SARL/EURL…) and draft the articles of association
Deposit the share capital into a dedicated bank account
Publish an incorporation notice in a legal-notices journal (annonce légale)
File online via INPI's one-stop shop (Guichet unique, replaced the CFE in 2023)
Receive your SIREN / SIRET and Kbis extract
Register for intra-EU VAT and, if needed, social-security / employer status
services.brandIntro: A practical overview of protecting your brand via INPI (France) or EUIPO (EU-wide).
brandSteps: Run an availability / prior-rights search in the INPI database
Pick your goods & services classes (Nice Classification)
File online with INPI (France) — or EUIPO for EU-wide protection
Formal and substantive examination by the office
